---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the current limitation or pain point.

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. If you have a specific implementation in mind, include it here.

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did they fall short?

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references here.
